name: pi-hooks
description: YAML hook automation for the PI coding agent: tool guards, session hooks, prompts, notifications, and bash actions.

scripts.test: npm src/pi/unsupported.test.ts && npm src/pi/ux-actions.test.ts && npm src/pi/config-paths.test.ts && npm src/pi/logger.test.ts && npm src/pi/logging.test.ts && npm src/pi/adapter.test.ts && npm src/core/bash-executor.test.ts && npm src/core/load-hooks-composition.test.ts && npm src/core/runtime-paths.test.ts && npm src/core/runtime-async.test.ts
